trace: Regex::new delegates to RegexBuilder::build() (src/builders.rs -> Builder::build_one_string), which calls regex-automata's meta Builder::build_many_from_hir. First, regex-automata/src/util/syntax.rs parse() runs regex-syntax's AST parser then HIR translator to produce a Hir. Next, nfa/thompson/compiler.rs Compiler::build_from_hir() walks the Hir tree to emit a Thompson NFA. Finally, meta/strategy.rs Strategy::new() consumes the NFA and RegexInfo to select and construct a concrete matcher (one-pass DFA, lazy hybrid DFA, full DFA, or backtracking NFA) wrapped in an Arc<dyn Strategy>.
